children.heading: .—Availability of Amounts and Government’s Share of Costs
children.label: b .—Availability of Amounts and Government’s Share of Costs
children.text: A grant under subsection (a) of this section may be made from amounts available under . The United States Government’s share of the grant is the percent for which a project for airport development at an airport would be eligible under section 47109(a) and (b) of this title.section 48103 of this title
